name: Grilled Cheese
instructions:
1. Let butter soften slightly or microwave for 10 seconds.

2. Spread butter evenly on one side of each bread slice.

3. Heat skillet over medium-low heat.

4. Place 2 bread slices butter-side-down on skillet.

5. Sprinkle cheddar cheese evenly over the 2 slices.

6. Top with remaining 2 bread slices, butter-side-up.

7. Cook 3-4 minutes until bottom is golden and crispy.

8. Carefully flip each sandwich. Cook another 2-3 minutes until second side is golden and cheese is melted.

9. Transfer to plate, slice diagonally, and serve hot.
simpleInstructions:
1. Spread butter on each bread slice.

2. Layer cheese on 2 slices, top with remaining bread.

3. Cook 3-4 minutes per side in skillet.

4. Slice and serve.
